params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression. Filterable properties include alertCreationTime, lastUpdateTime, incidentId, investigationId, id, assignedTo, detectionSource, lastEventTime, status, severity, and category.

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 10,000).

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand related entities. Supports expanding evidence.

items.docs: Retrieves a collection of alerts. Supports OData V4 query parameters including $filter, $top (max 10,000), $skip, and $expand for evidence. Rate limited to 100 calls per minute and 1,500 calls per hour.

info.name: Microsoft Defender Get alert by ID

params.name: alertId
params.description: The unique identifier of the alert.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific alert by its alert ID.

params.name: alertId
params.description: The unique identifier of the alert to update.

items.docs: Updates properties of an existing alert. Updatable properties are status, determination, classification, and assignedTo. A comment can be submitted with or without updating properties.

info.name: Microsoft Defender List alerts for a machine

params.name: machineId
params.description: The device ID of the machine.

items.docs: Retrieves a collection of alerts related to a specific machine.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression. Filterable properties include computerDnsName, id, version, deviceValue, aadDeviceId, machineTags, lastSeen, exposureLevel, onboardingStatus, lastIpAddress, healthStatus, osPlatform, riskScore, and rbacGroupId.

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 10,000).

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Retrieves a collection of machines that have communicated with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint. Supports OData V4 query parameters including $filter, $top (max 10,000), and $skip. Rate limited to 100 calls per minute and 1,500 calls per hour.

info.name: Microsoft Defender Get machine by ID

params.name: machineId
params.description: The device ID or computer name of the machine.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific machine by its device ID or computer name.

info.name: Microsoft Defender List vulnerabilities for a machine

params.name: machineId
params.description: The device ID of the machine.

items.docs: Retrieves a collection of discovered vulnerabilities related to a specific machine.

info.name: Microsoft Defender List machines affected by a vulnerability

params.name: vulnerabilityId
params.description: The CVE identifier of the vulnerability.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of machines affected by a specific vulnerability.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression. Filterable properties include id, name, description, cvssV3, publishedOn, severity, and updatedOn.

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 8,000).

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all vulnerabilities affecting the organization. Supports OData V4 query parameters including $filter, $top (max 8,000), and $skip.

info.name: Microsoft Defender Get vulnerability by ID

params.name: vulnerabilityId
params.description: The CVE identifier of the vulnerability.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific vulnerability by its CVE ID.
